Title: Browse products through category
Step Action: Launch the URL https://demowebshop.tricentis.com/ in the browser.
Provide valid login credentials (Email: johnsmith@test.com, Password: xxx) and log in.
Step Expected: User logs into the application successfully.

Step Action: Click Computers link in the left-most category menu.

Step Expected: Desktop products list appears on the screen.

Step Action: Click Build your own computer product link.
Verify product details are displayed on the page.
Step Expected: The system displays product information successfully.

Step Action: Click Logout link in the top-right corner of the page.
